tool_name: Hollow Structural Section HSS Connection Calculator - CIDECT EN 1993
category: Structural Engineering / Steel Connections / Hollow Section Joints
standards: CIDECT Design Guide for Circular Hollow Section Joints
CIDECT Design Guide for Rectangular Hollow Section Joints
IIW Static Design Recommendations for Hollow Section Joints
calculation_basis: Hollow structural section welded joint screening using CIDECT / IIW / EN 1993-1-8 style limit-state logic for CHS, RHS and SHS tubular joints. The calculator evaluates T/Y/X/K/N joint geometry, gap or overlap, brace angle, beta ratio, gamma ratio, tau ratio, chord stress parameter, member axial and moment demands, chord face plastification, chord punching shear, chord sidewall failure, chord shear failure, brace local failure, overlap brace failure, weld throat resistance, geometry validity range, material strength limits, local buckling gates, fatigue/seismic/fire gates and final joint efficiency. This tool is a preliminary engineering screening calculator and must not replace licensed EN 1993-1-8 design implementation, CIDECT design tables, finite-element verification, fatigue design, seismic design, weld procedure qualification, fabrication inspection or engineer-of-record approval.

inputs.name: Design Basis
inputs.validation_rule: Must be one of supported design basis modes.
inputs.note: Dual mode reports EN and CIDECT-style intermediate checks and selects the governing joint resistance.

inputs.name: HSS Family
inputs.validation_rule: Must be one of supported hollow-section family modes.
inputs.note: Controls geometric ratio definitions and applicable joint resistance helpers.

inputs.name: Joint Type
inputs.validation_rule: Must be one of supported HSS joint types.
inputs.note: KT, multiplanar and moment joints require specialist review unless project helper supports them.

inputs.name: Joint Loading Type
inputs.validation_rule: Must be one of supported loading modes.
inputs.note: This module is primarily for static welded tubular joints.

inputs.name: Chord Shape
inputs.validation_rule: Chord shape must be CHS, RHS or SHS.
inputs.note: Chord is the through member.

inputs.name: Brace Shape
inputs.validation_rule: Brace shape must be CHS, RHS or SHS.
inputs.note: Brace is the branch member welded to chord.

inputs.name: Chord Outside Diameter or Width
inputs.note: Use diameter for CHS chord and width b0 for RHS/SHS chord.

inputs.name: Chord Depth
inputs.note: For RHS/SHS chord. Use 0 for CHS chord to infer depth from diameter.

inputs.name: Chord Wall Thickness
inputs.note: Nominal or measured chord wall thickness.

inputs.name: Brace Outside Diameter or Width
inputs.note: Use diameter for CHS brace and width b1 for RHS/SHS brace.

inputs.name: Brace Depth
inputs.note: For RHS/SHS brace. Use 0 for CHS brace to infer depth from diameter.

inputs.name: Brace Wall Thickness
inputs.note: Nominal or measured brace wall thickness.

inputs.name: Second Brace Outside Diameter or Width
inputs.note: Required for K/N joints. Use 0 for single-brace T/Y/X joints.

inputs.name: Second Brace Wall Thickness
inputs.note: Required for K/N joints. Use 0 for single-brace joints.

inputs.name: Brace Angle to Chord
inputs.note: Angle between primary brace and chord axis.

inputs.name: Second Brace Angle to Chord
inputs.note: Required for K/N joints. Use 0 for single-brace joints.

inputs.name: Gap or Overlap
inputs.note: Positive value means gap. Negative value means overlap.

inputs.name: Overlap Ratio
inputs.note: Required for K/N overlap joints.

inputs.name: Chord Yield Strength
inputs.note: Chord steel yield strength.

inputs.name: Brace Yield Strength
inputs.note: Brace steel yield strength.

inputs.name: Chord Ultimate Strength
inputs.note: Chord ultimate strength for material validity and weld/heat affected zone review.

inputs.name: Brace Ultimate Strength
inputs.note: Brace ultimate strength for material validity and weld review.

inputs.name: Elastic Modulus
inputs.note: Typical structural steel value is 210000 MPa.

inputs.name: Chord Axial Force at Joint
inputs.note: Compression positive or project convention must be documented by engine. Used in chord stress function.

inputs.name: Chord Major-Axis Moment at Joint
inputs.note: Used for chord stress interaction.

inputs.name: Primary Brace Axial Force
inputs.note: Tension/compression sign convention must be documented. Resistance is checked using absolute demand.

inputs.name: Second Brace Axial Force
inputs.note: Required for K/N joints. Use 0 for single-brace joints.

inputs.name: Primary Brace In-Plane Moment
inputs.note: Nonzero value triggers moment-joint or interaction review unless helper supports it.

inputs.name: Primary Brace Out-of-Plane Moment
inputs.note: Nonzero value triggers moment-joint or interaction review unless helper supports it.

inputs.name: Chord Cross-Section Area
inputs.note: Used for chord stress ratio.

inputs.name: Brace Cross-Section Area
inputs.note: Used for brace member yield/failure check.

inputs.name: Chord Section Modulus
inputs.note: Used for chord moment stress. Use 0 if chord moment is not evaluated.

inputs.name: Weld Type
inputs.validation_rule: Must be one of supported weld types.
inputs.note: HSS joint resistance is not valid unless weld design and execution are adequate.

inputs.name: Effective Weld Throat
inputs.note: Use 0 if weld is designed by separate module.

inputs.name: Weld Design Resistance
inputs.note: Use 0 to trigger weld design review gate.

inputs.name: EN Partial Factor for HSS Joint Resistance
inputs.note: Use national annex or project specification.

inputs.name: Cold-Formed HSS
inputs.note: Cold-formed sections require corner, toughness and fabrication review.

inputs.name: Joint Stiffeners Present
inputs.note: Stiffened joints require separate stiffener design and are not covered by unstiffened joint formulas.

inputs.name: Multiplanar Joint
inputs.note: Multiplanar joints require interaction and specialist review.

inputs.name: Fatigue Design Required
inputs.note: Fatigue is critical for tubular joints and must be checked separately.

inputs.name: Seismic Design Required
inputs.note: Seismic tubular joint behavior, ductility and overstrength require specialist review.

inputs.name: Fire Design Required
inputs.note: Fire design is outside ambient-temperature static joint screening.

inputs.name: Weld Procedure and Inspection Verified
inputs.note: WPS/WPQR/NDT and execution class review are mandatory for production use.

inputs.name: Licensed Structural Engineer Review Completed
inputs.note: Final HSS joint design must be reviewed and approved by competent structural engineer.

formulas.name: Selected Chord Depth
assumptions: For CHS, depth equals outside diameter.
For SHS, depth may equal width when depth is not entered.
formulas.edge_cases: if (selected_chord_depth_mm <= 0) throw new Error('Selected chord depth must be positive')

formulas.name: Selected Brace Depth
assumptions: For CHS, depth equals outside diameter.
For SHS, depth may equal width when depth is not entered.
formulas.edge_cases: if (selected_brace_depth_mm <= 0) throw new Error('Selected brace depth must be positive')

formulas.name: Brace Angle Sine
assumptions: Brace angle is measured between brace axis and chord axis.
formulas.edge_cases: if (brace_angle_deg <= 0 || brace_angle_deg > 90) throw new Error('Brace angle must be within valid range')

formulas.name: Beta Ratio
formulas.reference: CIDECT / EN hollow section joint beta ratio
assumptions: For CHS joints beta = d1 / d0.
For RHS/SHS joints beta is based on brace width to chord width for screening.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_outer_diameter_or_width_mm <= 0) throw new Error('Chord outside dimension must be positive')
formulas.cursor_instruction: Render beta ratio with validity-range indicator.

formulas.name: Gamma Ratio
formulas.reference: CIDECT / EN hollow section joint gamma ratio
assumptions: For CHS gamma = d0 / 2t0.
For RHS/SHS this is used as b0 / 2t0 screening ratio.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_wall_thickness_mm <= 0) throw new Error('Chord wall thickness must be positive')
formulas.cursor_instruction: Render gamma ratio with validity-range indicator.

formulas.name: Tau Ratio
formulas.reference: CIDECT / EN hollow section joint tau ratio
assumptions: Primary brace thickness is compared with chord thickness.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_wall_thickness_mm <= 0) throw new Error('Chord wall thickness must be positive')
formulas.cursor_instruction: Render tau ratio with validity-range indicator.

formulas.name: Gap Ratio
assumptions: Positive gap_or_overlap_mm means a gap joint.
Overlap joints return zero gap ratio.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_wall_thickness_mm <= 0) throw new Error('Chord wall thickness must be positive')

formulas.name: Normalized Overlap Ratio
formulas.expression: gap_or_overlap_mm < 0 ? Math.max(overlap_ratio_percent, Math.abs(gap_or_overlap_mm) / Math.max(1, brace_outer_diameter_or_width_mm) * 100) : overlap_ratio_percent
assumptions: Entered overlap ratio is preferred.
Negative gap value can generate approximate overlap ratio.
formulas.edge_cases: if (normalized_overlap_ratio_percent < 0 || normalized_overlap_ratio_percent > 100) throw new Error('Overlap ratio must be between 0 and 100')

formulas.name: Chord Slenderness Ratio
assumptions: Used for local buckling and validity-range review.
Exact compactness/classification must be handled by EN 1993-1-1 helper.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_wall_thickness_mm <= 0) throw new Error('Chord wall thickness must be positive')

formulas.name: Brace Slenderness Ratio
assumptions: Used for brace local buckling and validity-range review.
formulas.edge_cases: if (brace_wall_thickness_mm <= 0) throw new Error('Brace wall thickness must be positive')

formulas.name: Brace Axial Demand Magnitude
assumptions: Resistance check uses absolute brace axial demand.
Tension/compression failure mode differences are handled by helper.
formulas.edge_cases: if (!isFinite(primary_brace_axial_demand_kn)) throw new Error('Primary brace axial demand is invalid')

formulas.name: Second Brace Axial Demand Magnitude
assumptions: Required for K/N joints.
Use zero for single-brace joints.
formulas.edge_cases: if (!isFinite(second_brace_axial_demand_kn)) throw new Error('Second brace axial demand is invalid')

formulas.name: Chord Axial Stress Ratio
assumptions: Uses gross chord area.
Compression/tension sign effects are handled by chord stress function helper.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_cross_section_area_mm2 <= 0 || chord_yield_strength_mpa <= 0) throw new Error('Chord area and yield strength must be positive')

formulas.name: Chord Bending Stress Ratio
assumptions: Uses chord section modulus where entered.
Returns zero when chord section modulus is not provided.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_section_modulus_mm3 < 0) throw new Error('Chord section modulus cannot be negative')

formulas.name: Chord Stress Parameter
formulas.reference: CIDECT / EN chord stress parameter screening
assumptions: Simplified chord stress parameter used for screening.
Final code implementation must apply exact sign convention and stress function.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_stress_parameter_n < 0) throw new Error('Chord stress parameter cannot be negative')

formulas.name: Chord Stress Function
assumptions: Helper applies code-specific chord stress reduction or enhancement.
Exact formula depends on joint type, chord force sign and selected basis.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_stress_function_qf <= 0) throw new Error('Chord stress function must be positive')

formulas.name: Geometry Validity Table
formulas.expression: checkHssJointGeometryValidity(design_basis, hss_family, joint_type, chord_shape, brace_shape, beta_ratio, gamma_ratio, tau_ratio, gap_ratio, normalized_overlap_ratio_percent, brace_angle_deg, second_brace_angle_deg, chord_slenderness_ratio, brace_slenderness_ratio)
formulas.dimensional_check: geometry checks in ratio, mm and degree
assumptions: Helper checks validity ranges without embedding copyrighted design tables.
Out-of-range geometry requires specialist verification.
formulas.edge_cases: if (!geometry_validity_table || geometry_validity_table.length === 0) throw new Error('Geometry validity table is required')
formulas.uncertainty_expression: Geometry validity confidence depends on drawing tolerance and helper rule coverage.

formulas.name: Geometry Validity Status
assumptions: FAIL and WARN are generated by validity-range helper.
formulas.edge_cases: if (!geometry_validity_status) throw new Error('Geometry validity status cannot be determined')

formulas.name: Brace Member Yield Resistance
formulas.reference: Brace member axial yield resistance screening
assumptions: Gross brace area is used.
Brace member buckling outside joint region must be checked separately.
formulas.edge_cases: if (brace_cross_section_area_mm2 <= 0 || brace_yield_strength_mpa <= 0) throw new Error('Brace area and yield strength must be positive')

formulas.name: Chord Face Plastification Resistance
formulas.expression: computeChordFacePlastificationResistance(design_basis, hss_family, joint_type, chord_shape, brace_shape, chord_outer_diameter_or_width_mm, selected_chord_depth_mm, chord_wall_thickness_mm, brace_outer_diameter_or_width_mm, selected_brace_depth_mm, brace_angle_deg, beta_ratio, gamma_ratio, tau_ratio, chord_yield_strength_mpa, chord_stress_function_qf, gamma_m5)
formulas.reference: CIDECT / EN chord face plastification limit state
assumptions: Helper applies applicable CHS/RHS/SHS joint equations.
Unstiffened welded joint behavior is assumed.
Exact code tables and validity conditions are handled by helper.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_face_plastification_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Chord face plastification resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: Punching Shear Resistance
formulas.expression: computePunchingShearResistance(design_basis, hss_family, joint_type, chord_shape, brace_shape, chord_wall_thickness_mm, brace_outer_diameter_or_width_mm, selected_brace_depth_mm, brace_angle_deg, chord_yield_strength_mpa, chord_ultimate_strength_mpa, gamma_m5)
formulas.reference: CIDECT / EN chord punching shear limit state
assumptions: Helper computes chord wall punching around brace footprint.
Weld geometry and brace footprint are simplified unless detailed data are supplied.
formulas.edge_cases: if (punching_shear_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Punching shear resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: Chord Sidewall Failure Resistance
formulas.expression: computeChordSidewallFailureResistance(design_basis, hss_family, joint_type, chord_shape, brace_shape, chord_outer_diameter_or_width_mm, selected_chord_depth_mm, chord_wall_thickness_mm, brace_outer_diameter_or_width_mm, selected_brace_depth_mm, brace_angle_deg, chord_yield_strength_mpa, gamma_m5)
assumptions: Primarily relevant to RHS/SHS chords.
For CHS-only joints helper returns not-governing large resistance with applicability note.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_sidewall_failure_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Chord sidewall resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: Chord Shear Failure Resistance
formulas.expression: computeChordShearFailureResistance(design_basis, hss_family, joint_type, chord_shape, chord_outer_diameter_or_width_mm, selected_chord_depth_mm, chord_wall_thickness_mm, gap_or_overlap_mm, brace_angle_deg, second_brace_angle_deg, chord_yield_strength_mpa, gamma_m5)
formulas.reference: K/N gap joint chord shear failure screening
assumptions: Most relevant for K/N gap joints.
Helper applies joint-type-specific shear failure logic.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_shear_failure_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Chord shear failure resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: Brace Local Failure Resistance
formulas.expression: computeBraceLocalFailureResistance(design_basis, hss_family, joint_type, brace_shape, brace_outer_diameter_or_width_mm, selected_brace_depth_mm, brace_wall_thickness_mm, brace_yield_strength_mpa, brace_ultimate_strength_mpa, brace_angle_deg, gamma_m5)
formulas.reference: Brace local failure / effective width failure screening
assumptions: Helper checks brace wall local yielding or effective-width failure at joint.
Brace global buckling is outside this joint calculator.
formulas.edge_cases: if (brace_local_failure_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Brace local failure resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: Overlap Joint Brace Failure Resistance
formulas.expression: joint_type === 'K_OVERLAP_JOINT' || joint_type === 'N_OVERLAP_JOINT' ? computeOverlapBraceFailureResistance(design_basis, hss_family, joint_type, brace_outer_diameter_or_width_mm, selected_brace_depth_mm, brace_wall_thickness_mm, second_brace_outer_diameter_or_width_mm, second_brace_wall_thickness_mm, normalized_overlap_ratio_percent, brace_yield_strength_mpa, gamma_m5) : null
formulas.dimensional_check: joint resistance in kN or null
formulas.reference: K/N overlap joint brace failure screening
assumptions: Only applicable to overlap joints.
Overlap geometry and hidden weld detail require strict drawing review.
formulas.edge_cases: if ((joint_type === 'K_OVERLAP_JOINT' || joint_type === 'N_OVERLAP_JOINT') && (overlap_brace_failure_resistance_kn === null || overlap_brace_failure_resistance_kn <= 0)) throw new Error('Overlap brace failure resistance must be positive for overlap joints')

formulas.name: Local Chord Buckling Resistance
formulas.expression: computeLocalChordBucklingResistance(design_basis, chord_shape, chord_outer_diameter_or_width_mm, selected_chord_depth_mm, chord_wall_thickness_mm, chord_yield_strength_mpa, elastic_modulus_mpa, chord_slenderness_ratio, gamma_m5)
assumptions: Helper evaluates local wall buckling risk and returns equivalent resistance or review value.
Thin-walled HSS may require EN 1993-1-5 or shell/local analysis.
formulas.edge_cases: if (local_chord_buckling_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Local chord buckling resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: Weld Resistance
formulas.expression: weld_design_resistance_kn > 0 ? weld_design_resistance_kn : computeScreeningWeldResistance(weld_type, effective_weld_throat_mm, brace_outer_diameter_or_width_mm, selected_brace_depth_mm, brace_angle_deg, brace_ultimate_strength_mpa, gamma_m5)
assumptions: Direct weld resistance input is preferred.
Screening weld helper is not a replacement for detailed weld design.
WPS/WPQR/NDT review is mandatory.
formulas.edge_cases: if (selected_weld_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Weld resistance must be positive or separately verified')
formulas.cursor_instruction: Render selected weld resistance with caution.

formulas.name: Selected Primary Brace Joint Resistance
formulas.expression: min([brace_member_yield_resistance_kn, chord_face_plastification_resistance_kn, punching_shear_resistance_kn, chord_sidewall_failure_resistance_kn, chord_shear_failure_resistance_kn, brace_local_failure_resistance_kn, overlap_brace_failure_resistance_kn === null ? 1e99 : overlap_brace_failure_resistance_kn, local_chord_buckling_resistance_kn, selected_weld_resistance_kn])
assumptions: Lowest applicable limit-state resistance controls.
Not-applicable overlap resistance is ignored by sentinel inside helper engine.
formulas.edge_cases: if (selected_primary_brace_joint_resistance_kn <= 0 || selected_primary_brace_joint_resistance_kn === 1e99) throw new Error('Selected joint resistance is invalid')
formulas.cursor_instruction: Render selected primary brace joint resistance.

formulas.name: Chord Face Plastification Utilization
assumptions: Primary brace axial demand is checked against chord face plastification resistance.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_face_plastification_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Chord face plastification resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: Punching Shear Utilization
assumptions: Brace axial demand is checked against chord punching shear resistance.
formulas.edge_cases: if (punching_shear_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Punching shear resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: Chord Sidewall Failure Utilization
assumptions: Most relevant for RHS/SHS chord joints.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_sidewall_failure_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Chord sidewall resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: Chord Shear Failure Utilization
assumptions: Most relevant for K/N gap joints.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_shear_failure_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Chord shear resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: Brace Local Failure Utilization
assumptions: Brace local failure at joint is checked separately from member buckling.
formulas.edge_cases: if (brace_local_failure_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Brace local failure resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: Weld Utilization
assumptions: Weld demand is simplified from brace axial demand.
Detailed weld stress distribution is outside this helper unless implemented separately.
formulas.edge_cases: if (selected_weld_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Weld resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: Primary Joint Utilization
assumptions: Demand and selected resistance basis are consistent.
Moment interaction is handled by review gate unless helper supports it.
formulas.edge_cases: if (selected_primary_brace_joint_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Selected joint resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: Governing Failure Mode
formulas.expression: identifyGoverningHssFailureMode({BRACE_MEMBER_YIELD: primary_brace_axial_demand_kn / brace_member_yield_resistance_kn, CHORD_FACE_PLASTIFICATION: chord_face_plastification_utilization, PUNCHING_SHEAR: punching_shear_utilization, CHORD_SIDEWALL_FAILURE: chord_sidewall_failure_utilization, CHORD_SHEAR_FAILURE: chord_shear_failure_utilization, BRACE_LOCAL_FAILURE: brace_local_failure_utilization, WELD_FAILURE: weld_utilization})
assumptions: Largest utilization defines the governing numeric failure mode.
Review gates can still govern final decision.
formulas.edge_cases: if (!governing_failure_mode) throw new Error('Governing failure mode cannot be determined')
formulas.uncertainty_expression: Classification confidence depends on failure mode utilization uncertainty.

formulas.name: Joint Efficiency
formulas.reference: Joint efficiency relative to brace member yield resistance
assumptions: Joint efficiency below 1.0 means joint resistance is lower than brace member yield resistance.
formulas.edge_cases: if (brace_member_yield_resistance_kn <= 0) throw new Error('Brace yield resistance must be positive')

formulas.name: Moment Interaction Status
formulas.reference: HSS joint moment interaction review gate
assumptions: This schema primarily evaluates axial brace joint resistance.
Brace moments require moment joint interaction module unless helper is extended.
formulas.edge_cases: if (primary_brace_in_plane_moment_knm < 0 || primary_brace_out_of_plane_moment_knm < 0) throw new Error('Brace moments cannot be negative')

formulas.name: Special Geometry Status
assumptions: Standard screening applies to unstiffened planar joints only.
Stiffened, KT and multiplanar joints require specialist review.
formulas.edge_cases: if (!special_geometry_status) throw new Error('Special geometry status cannot be determined')

formulas.name: Material and Local Buckling Status
formulas.reference: Material strength and local buckling review gate
assumptions: High-strength steel and thin walls require code-specific reduction or specialist review.
Thresholds are screening values; final code limits must be applied by helper.
formulas.edge_cases: if (chord_yield_strength_mpa <= 0 || brace_yield_strength_mpa <= 0) throw new Error('Yield strengths must be positive')

formulas.name: Weld QA Status
formulas.reference: Weld procedure, resistance and inspection gate
assumptions: Weld quality and access are critical for HSS tubular joints.
WPS/WPQR/NDT review is required for production use.
formulas.edge_cases: if (!weld_qa_status) throw new Error('Weld QA status cannot be determined')

formulas.name: Special Design Status
formulas.reference: Fatigue, seismic, fire and cold-formed HSS review gates
assumptions: Fatigue, seismic and fire cases require specialist modules.
Cold-formed sections require corner, toughness and fabrication review.
formulas.edge_cases: if (typeof fatigue_design_required !== 'boolean' || typeof seismic_design_required !== 'boolean' || typeof fire_design_required !== 'boolean') throw new Error('Special design flags must be boolean')

formulas.name: Strength Status
assumptions: Utilization limit is 1.0 for screening.
All applicable numeric limit states are included in selected resistance.
formulas.edge_cases: if (primary_joint_utilization < 0) throw new Error('Primary joint utilization cannot be negative')
formulas.uncertainty_expression: Classification confidence depends on utilization uncertainty.

formulas.name: Engineer Review Status
assumptions: Final tubular joint design requires competent structural engineer review.
Software output is not a sealed calculation.
formulas.edge_cases: if (typeof licensed_engineer_review_completed !== 'boolean') throw new Error('Engineer review flag must be boolean')

formulas.name: HSS Joint Risk Class
formulas.expression: strength_status === 'HSS_JOINT_STRENGTH_NOT_ACCEPTABLE' ? 'HSS_JOINT_STRENGTH_NOT_ACCEPTABLE' : (geometry_validity_status !== 'HSS_GEOMETRY_VALID_FOR_SCREENING' ? geometry_validity_status : (special_geometry_status !== 'UNSTIFFENED_PLANAR_JOINT_SCREENING' ? special_geometry_status : (material_local_buckling_status !== 'MATERIAL_AND_LOCAL_BUCKLING_ACCEPTABLE_FOR_SCREENING' ? material_local_buckling_status : (weld_qa_status !== 'WELD_QA_ACCEPTABLE_FOR_SCREENING' ? weld_qa_status : (moment_interaction_status !== 'AXIAL_JOINT_SCREENING' ? moment_interaction_status : (special_design_status !== 'NO_SPECIAL_DESIGN_TRIGGERED' ? special_design_status : (engineer_review_status !== 'LICENSED_ENGINEER_REVIEW_COMPLETED' ? engineer_review_status : 'CONTROLLED_HSS_JOINT_SCREENING')))))))
assumptions: Strength, geometry validity, special geometry, material/local buckling, weld QA, moment interaction, special design and engineer gates are evaluated together.
Review gates can override numerical acceptance.
formulas.edge_cases: if (!hss_joint_risk_class) throw new Error('HSS joint risk class cannot be determined')
formulas.uncertainty_expression: Classification confidence depends on geometry, material, chord stress, joint type, weld data, validity range and review gates.

formulas.name: Decision
formulas.expression: strength_status === 'HSS_JOINT_STRENGTH_NOT_ACCEPTABLE' ? 'HSS_CONNECTION_STRENGTH_NOT_ACCEPTABLE' : (geometry_validity_status !== 'HSS_GEOMETRY_VALID_FOR_SCREENING' ? geometry_validity_status : (special_geometry_status !== 'UNSTIFFENED_PLANAR_JOINT_SCREENING' ? special_geometry_status : (material_local_buckling_status !== 'MATERIAL_AND_LOCAL_BUCKLING_ACCEPTABLE_FOR_SCREENING' ? material_local_buckling_status : (weld_qa_status !== 'WELD_QA_ACCEPTABLE_FOR_SCREENING' ? weld_qa_status : (moment_interaction_status !== 'AXIAL_JOINT_SCREENING' ? moment_interaction_status : (special_design_status !== 'NO_SPECIAL_DESIGN_TRIGGERED' ? special_design_status : (engineer_review_status !== 'LICENSED_ENGINEER_REVIEW_COMPLETED' ? engineer_review_status : 'HSS_CONNECTION_ACCEPTABLE_FOR_SCREENING')))))))
assumptions: Final acceptance requires correct EN/CIDECT basis, geometry validity, weld design, WPS/WPQR/NDT, fatigue review where needed, fabrication review and structural engineer approval.
Screening acceptance does not authorize fabrication, welding, erection or member substitution.
formulas.edge_cases: if (!decision) throw new Error('Decision cannot be determined')
formulas.uncertainty_expression: Decision confidence depends on joint geometry, section data, material certificates, chord stress, weld design, fatigue/seismic/fire triggers and engineer review.

outputs.name: HSS Connection Decision
outputs.uncertainty: Decision confidence depends on joint geometry, section data, material certificates, chord stress, weld design, fatigue/seismic/fire triggers and engineer review

outputs.name: HSS Joint Risk Class
outputs.uncertainty: Classification confidence depends on geometry, material, chord stress, joint type, weld data, validity range and review gates

outputs.name: Governing Failure Mode
outputs.uncertainty: Classification confidence depends on failure mode utilization uncertainty

outputs.name: Geometry Validity Table
outputs.uncertainty: Geometry validity confidence depends on drawing tolerance and helper rule coverage

outputs.name: Overlap Brace Failure Resistance
outputs.uncertainty: u_c ≈ overlap brace failure resistance × 0.45 when applicable

outputs.name: Strength Status
outputs.uncertainty: Classification confidence depends on utilization uncertainty

rules.message: Chord and brace outside dimensions and wall thicknesses must be positive.
Primary brace angle must be between 15 and 90 degrees.
Second brace angle must be between 0 and 90 degrees.
Overlap ratio must be between 0 and 100 percent.

rules.condition: chord_yield_strength_mpa > 0 && brace_yield_strength_mpa > 0 && chord_ultimate_strength_mpa >= chord_yield_strength_mpa && brace_ultimate_strength_mpa >= brace_yield_strength_mpa
rules.message: Chord and brace material strengths are invalid.
Chord and brace section properties are invalid.
Weld throat and weld resistance cannot be negative.
Gap joint selected but positive gap is not entered.
Overlap joint selected but overlap ratio is not positive.
K/N joint requires second brace geometry.
Fillet weld selected but neither effective throat nor weld resistance is entered.
High-strength HSS may require resistance reduction or specialist review.
Stiffened HSS joint requires separate stiffener design.
Multiplanar HSS joint requires specialist interaction review.

smart_warnings.message: Licensed structural engineer review is not completed. Do not use result for fabrication, welding or erection.
Brace demand exceeds selected HSS joint resistance.
Joint geometry is outside CIDECT/EN validity range in screening check.
Joint geometry requires code table or specialist review.
Weld procedure, inspection or weld resistance is not verified.
Fatigue design is required. Static HSS joint resistance is not sufficient.
Seismic HSS joint design requires ductility, overstrength and cyclic behavior review.
Fire design required. Ambient-temperature HSS joint resistance is not sufficient.
Brace moment or combined loading detected. Use HSS moment interaction module or specialist review.
Joint is stiffened, multiplanar, KT or otherwise outside standard planar unstiffened screening.
High-strength or thin-wall HSS requires material/local buckling review.
Joint utilization is above 0.90. Review geometry tolerance, weld detail, chord stress function and validity range.

engine_rules.error_propagation: ISO/IEC Guide 98-3 GUM Type A/B. Report u_c(y) for beta, gamma, tau, gap ratio, overlap ratio, chord stress parameter, chord stress function, brace member yield resistance, chord face plastification resistance, punching shear resistance, chord sidewall resistance, chord shear resistance, brace local failure resistance, overlap brace failure resistance, local chord buckling resistance, weld resistance, selected joint resistance, utilization and joint efficiency. Use root-sum-square propagation for direct formulas and scenario/Monte Carlo propagation for helper-based failure modes where available. Flag high uncertainty when geometry is near validity limits, chord stress is high, weld data is missing, joint is overlap/stiffened/multiplanar, material strength exceeds standard range, or fatigue/seismic/fire is triggered.
engine_rules.fmea: Required if primary_joint_utilization > 0.90, geometry_validity_status is not valid, weld_qa_status is not acceptable, fatigue_design_required = true, seismic_design_required = true, joint is overlap/stiffened/multiplanar, material_local_buckling_status is not acceptable, or the joint is life-safety/public-access/production-critical. RPN = S×O×D.
engine_rules.audit_log: ISO 9001 traceable fields: design basis, HSS family, joint type, loading type, chord shape, brace shape, chord dimensions, brace dimensions, second brace dimensions, brace angles, gap/overlap, material strengths, chord force, chord moment, brace forces, brace moments, section properties, weld type, weld throat, weld resistance, gamma_M5, cold-formed flag, stiffener flag, multiplanar flag, fatigue flag, seismic flag, fire flag, weld QA flag, engineer review flag, all formula outputs, warnings, decision, formula version, timestamp and input hash.

helpers_required.signature: computeChordStressFunction(designBasis: string, jointType: string, n: number, chordAxialForceKn: number): number
helpers_required.description: Computes code-specific chord stress function for tubular joint resistance.

helpers_required.description: Checks CIDECT/EN validity ranges for HSS joint geometry without embedding copyrighted tables.

helpers_required.description: Computes chord face plastification resistance for applicable CHS/RHS/SHS welded tubular joints.

helpers_required.description: Computes chord punching shear resistance around the brace footprint.

helpers_required.name: computeChordSidewallFailureResistance
helpers_required.signature: computeChordSidewallFailureResistance(designBasis: string, hssFamily: string, jointType: string, chordShape: string, braceShape: string, b0: number, h0: number, t0: number, b1: number, h1: number, theta: number, fy0: number, gammaM5: number): number
helpers_required.description: Computes RHS/SHS chord sidewall failure resistance where applicable.

helpers_required.description: Returns the limit state with maximum evaluated utilization.

helpers_required.name: min
helpers_required.description: Returns minimum finite numeric value while ignoring nulls and sentinel values.

reference_code.validation: Zod schema. Fail closed on invalid geometry, invalid brace angles, invalid material strengths, invalid section properties, invalid weld inputs, invalid gamma_M5 and invalid boolean review gates.
reference_code.testing: Jest cases: CHS T joint axial brace, CHS X joint, RHS T joint, RHS K gap joint, RHS K overlap joint, SHS Y joint, invalid beta out-of-range, high gamma warning, high-strength steel warning, thin-wall local buckling warning, chord stress function reduction, chord face plastification governing, punching shear governing, chord sidewall failure governing, chord shear failure governing, brace local failure governing, weld failure governing, moment interaction gate, stiffened joint gate, multiplanar joint gate, fatigue gate, seismic gate, fire gate, weld QA missing gate, engineer review missing gate, final acceptable screening decision.
implementation_notes: Do not use eval(). Use existing AST/helper expression engine.
Use deterministic formula order F1 to F46.
Use SI-primary units: kN, kN*m, mm, mm2, mm3, MPa, degree and ratio.
Use null for not-applicable overlap resistance, not Infinity.
Do not embed copyrighted CIDECT or EN design tables. Geometry validity and resistance helpers must use licensed implementation or project-configurable traceable equations.
Standard screening is limited to unstiffened planar welded hollow-section joints unless helper explicitly supports special cases.
Moment interaction, KT joints, multiplanar joints, stiffened joints, fatigue, seismic and fire must trigger review gates unless specialist modules are implemented.
Weld design must not be assumed adequate. WPS/WPQR/NDT and EN 1090 execution quality must be explicitly verified.
High-strength steel and cold-formed HSS may require reduction factors, corner property review, toughness review and fabrication review.

Decision enum values: HSS_CONNECTION_ACCEPTABLE_FOR_SCREENING, HSS_CONNECTION_STRENGTH_NOT_ACCEPTABLE, HSS_GEOMETRY_OUTSIDE_VALIDITY_RANGE, HSS_GEOMETRY_REVIEW_REQUIRED, STIFFENED_HSS_JOINT_REVIEW_REQUIRED, MULTIPLANAR_HSS_JOINT_REVIEW_REQUIRED, KT_HSS_JOINT_REVIEW_REQUIRED, HIGH_STRENGTH_HSS_REDUCTION_OR_REVIEW_REQUIRED, HSS_LOCAL_BUCKLING_REVIEW_REQUIRED, WELD_PROCEDURE_INSPECTION_OR_RESISTANCE_REVIEW_REQUIRED, HSS_MOMENT_INTERACTION_REVIEW_REQUIRED, FATIGUE_HSS_JOINT_REVIEW_REQUIRED, SEISMIC_HSS_JOINT_REVIEW_REQUIRED, FIRE_HSS_JOINT_REVIEW_REQUIRED, COLD_FORMED_HSS_FABRICATION_REVIEW_REQUIRED, LICENSED_ENGINEER_REVIEW_REQUIRED.

tuv_checklist: Beta, gamma and tau ratios implemented
FMEA required for high utilization, fatigue, seismic, geometry out-of-range, weld QA missing and special joint cases
Audit hash generated for every successful calculation
No hidden defaults for geometry, material strengths, chord stress, brace demand, weld verification, fatigue/seismic/fire or engineer review gates
metadata.calibration_trace: Joint geometry from approved connection drawing/BIM; HSS section properties from EN 10210/EN 10219 section table, mill certificate or measured data; material strengths from mill certificate; member forces from structural analysis/load combinations; weld data from WPS/WPQR/weld design; NDT and execution records from EN 1090 QA system; final approval from engineer of record.
source_basis: CIDECT hollow section joint design guidance context
IIW static design recommendations for hollow section joints context
EN 1993-1-8 hollow section joint design context
EN 1090-2 steel execution and fabrication quality context
ISO/IEC Guide 98-3 GUM uncertainty reporting basis
limitations: This calculator is an HSS tubular joint screening tool, not a sealed structural calculation, licensed CIDECT table implementation, finite-element model, fatigue design, seismic design, fire design, weld procedure qualification or fabrication approval.
Exact resistance equations and validity ranges depend on section shape, joint type, loading, geometry range, chord stress, gap/overlap and selected national annex/project specification.
Stiffened, multiplanar, KT, moment-resisting, cast node, bolted, grouted, concrete-filled, tapered, curved or heavily eccentric joints require specialist design.
Fatigue often governs tubular joints and must be checked separately where cyclic loading exists.
Weld access, weld throat, fit-up, hidden welds in overlap joints, WPS/WPQR, NDT and EN 1090 execution class are mandatory production controls.
Final use requires competent structural engineer approval and project-specific code compliance.
metadata.cursor_instruction: Integrate this tool into the existing SectorCalc PRO tool architecture without creating a new UI framework. Use current tool-card, HSS geometry input pattern, tubular joint diagram panel, results panel, formula panel, warning panel, chart panel, table panel and audit log components.
